rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Dismiss Pltff'S Complaint With Prejudice For Failure To Timely Amend
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 24, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT RECONSTRUCT COMPANY N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. SUCESSOR BY MERGER TO, COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC, THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaitiff'S Complaint With Prejudice For Failure To Timely Amend. GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Answers To Specially Prepared Interrogatories-Set One;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 24, 2013, line 2.(part 4 of 8) PLAINTIFF HANS REINHARDT Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Answers To Specially Prepared Interrogatories-Set One. DENIED without prejudice for Plaintiff to re-serve discovery narrowing it to breach of warranty of habitability only (this does not prevent Plaintiff from serving discovery related to newly asserted causes of action); Order sustaining demurrer was filed on May 6, 2013 and Defendant properly preserved objections in May 7, 2013 responses. See Opposition 3:8-14. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 24, 2013, line 2. (Part 8 of 8) PLAINTIFF HANS REINHARDT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint. GRANTED. Plaintiff shall file his proposed Third Amended Complaint as attached to October 7, 2013 filing. Plaintiff shall bear all costs (including attorney's fees) associated with any necessary discovery related to the new causes of action only: (1) discovery as to the only currently alleged cause of action has already been conducted by defendant; and (2) Plaintiff was aware of the facts giving rise to the new causes of action since at least October 2011 when Unlawful Detainer was filed and verified by Spitalnikov for Prana Eight as plaintiff. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PETER GRIMES et al VS. COUNTRY WIDE BANK, AS THE ORIGINAL LENDER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 24, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST, RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.("RECONTRUST"), COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC. (SUED ERRONEOUSLY, THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON TRUST COMPANY, DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall have 10 days form the notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. ALL PERSONS CLAIMING INTEREST IN, OR LIEN UPON,
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 24, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Application For Judgment. GRANTED. Moving party sustained its burden under CCP 751.01 et seq., no adverse claim have been made. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEY RUSSELL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Osc Why A Preliminary Injunction Should Not Be Issued
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 24, 2013, line. 6 Osc Why A Preliminary Injunction Should Not Be Issued. DENIED. Plaintiff failed to sustain burden and show likelihood of prevailing on the merits. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. Plaintiff's objections are overruled. Plaintiff's monthly payments starting December 2011, excluding escrow, were at least $4,157.62 a month. = (501/REQ)
